metadata.description: Automated rule checklist for auditLogic and OCR pipeline
metadata.purpose: Prevent common logic errors during development

critical_rules.title: claimedOCRInvNos must use Set, not Array
critical_rules.description: Prevents duplicate invoice calculation in multi-row same-voucher_id case

critical_rules.title: T500 ERP row must skip amount diff completely
critical_rules.description: T500 tax_code has special amount accounting, skip comparison entirely
checkpoints: If erpIsBusOrRailTicket, never add 'amount' to diffDetails

critical_rules.title: isCountableForAmount is the only invoice filter for amount comparison
critical_rules.description: All amount calculations must use this function to exclude TXXX and non-invoice types

critical_rules.title: shouldSkipFromAudit and ERP TXXX skip must be in sync
critical_rules.description: If OCR can skip (shouldSkipFromAudit=true), ERP must also skip (auditStatus=SKIPPED)
checkpoints: When modifying shouldSkipFromAudit, check ERP layer skip at line 95-99
If new skip condition added to shouldSkipFromAudit, add corresponding ERP skip
Test must verify both layers skip together

critical_rules.title: Buyer tax_id '16547744' never written to Supabase
critical_rules.description: Own buyer tax ID would pollute seller database. Must filter before upsert.
critical_rules.validation: Check if filter exists in upsertSeller()

important_rules.title: normInvoiceNumber() must be called before any comparison
important_rules.description: ERP invoice_numbers may contain spaces, mixed case, hyphens

important_rules.title: Gemini deduplication requires 3-step order: non-invoice → ghost → duplicate
important_rules.description: Cannot reorder or skip steps; will cause duplicates
steps: Step 1: Filter out non-invoice pages (packing list, delivery note keywords)
Step 2: Remove ghost duplicates (same amount ±5, no invoice_number)

important_rules.title: Image enhancement gamma value locked at 0.75 for low-contrast
important_rules.description: Changing gamma to 0.8 or higher will over-sharpen clear images
important_rules.validation: Test on faint ink documents (XW17220651) before change

before_commit: Check: Did I modify auditLogic.ts or geminiService.ts?
If yes: Update version stamp in CLAUDE-ocr-business-logic.md
Check: Did I add new tax_code or voucher_type?
If yes: Update CLAUDE-ocr-business-logic.md + add test case
Review: Does this change violate any CRITICAL_RULES above?
after_merge: Monitor: Amount mismatch rate should not spike > 2x
Log: Any edge cases discovered, add to known-bugs.md
Update: design-decisions.md if design rationale changed
